accepted.reason: Prime generation with trial division is a clean integer-loop baseline for optimization tasks.

MinMaxCut aggregation over cluster partitions is useful graph-partition objective logic.
Pointset insertion/search and transform operations provide reusable geometry data-structure kernels.
